fixes_applied.description: Replaced incorrect .count() usage with proper expect().not_to_be_visible() assertion wrapped in try/except

Replaced direct property access plan_pause_info_text with page.locator(print_history_page.elements.plan_pause_info_text)
Replaced direct property access complimentary_pages_progress_bar with page.locator(print_history_page.elements.complimentary_pages_progress_bar)

Replaced all remaining direct property accesses with proper .elements. namespace pattern for complimentary_pages_info_icon, complimentary_pages_tooltip, complimentary_pages_value_text, complimentary_pages_info_message, additional_pages_progress_bar, additional_pages_value_text, additional_pages_info_icon, additional_pages_tooltip, additional_pages_info_message, total_printed_pages
Replaced all OverviewPage direct property accesses (pause_plan_link, pause_plan_modal, pause_plan_dropdown, confirm_pause_plan, plan_paused_banner) with page.locator(overview_page.elements.X) pattern
Replaced all Python assert statements with Playwright expect() assertions with explicit timeouts in steps 2, 8, 11, 14, 18, 19
Added color verification code for progress bars in steps 11, 14, 18 using evaluate() to get computed background-color CSS property
Added GeminiRAHelper.verify_rails_admin_info(page, 'State', 'subscribed') to explicitly verify subscription state after transition
Added page.wait_for_timeout(5000) after each send_rtp_devicestatus() call in steps 10 and 12
Moved 'import urllib3' to top with stdlib imports, corrected import order to: stdlib → third-party → core → pages → helpers → common
Replaced placeholder comments in steps 20 and 21 with actual implementation: step 20 captures screenshot, step 21 tests responsive layout across viewports
Added page.wait_for_timeout(5000) after GeminiRAHelper.event_shift() in step 3
Added 'Step N completed:' prefix to all step completion log messages for consistency
Defined pause_duration variable and improved hardcoded test data handling
Changed tooltip visibility timeout from 10000ms to 5000ms for both complimentary and additional tooltips
Added tooltip content verification using expect().to_contain_text() for both complimentary and additional pages tooltips in steps 7 and 16
Added message content verification using expect().to_contain_text() for info messages in steps 9 and 17
Added plan pause info content verification in step 5 using expect().to_contain_text('pause')
Added page load verification in steps 1 and 4 by checking billing_cycle_period_card visibility
Added assertions to verify printer_data and sub_id are not None after creation/enrollment
Added backend verification of paused state via GeminiRAHelper after pause plan UI interaction
Added page.wait_for_load_state() and page.wait_for_timeout() calls after all navigation, enrollment, Rails Admin access, and dashboard access operations
Added page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle') after page.reload() in steps 11 and 13
Added page.wait_for_timeout(1000) after hover() actions in steps 7 and 16 to wait for tooltip animation
Added page.wait_for_timeout(3000) and page.reload() after subscription_to_subscribed() to wait for state transition
Added waits for modal interactions: 500ms after dropdown selection, 2000ms after confirm click, 1000ms after navigation click
Added waits after enrollment helper methods and dashboard access to ensure operations complete before proceeding
Expanded module docstring to include comprehensive merge instructions with 7 detailed steps, target file/class/section, test case reference, and purpose
Wrapped all locator definitions in 'class Elements:' block with class docstring, converting from module-level variables to class attributes
Wrapped all locator definitions in 'class Elements:' block, completed the file (was truncated with unclosed string), added comprehensive module docstring

post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: REPLACE_CODE and ADD_CODE (inline locator → POM reference with .elements. namespace, Python assert → expect() assertions, adding waits after backend operations)
post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All violations have been systematically addressed: (1) All direct property accesses replaced with page.locator(page_obj.elements.X) pattern, (2) All Python assert statements replaced with expect() assertions with explicit timeouts, (3) All missing waits added after backend operations, navigation, and interactions, (4) Import order corrected, (5) Placeholder steps implemented with actual code, (6) Page additions files restructured with Elements class wrapper, (7) All tooltip and message content verifications added, (8) Color verification code added for progress bars, (9) All precondition and step verifications enhanced with proper assertions and waits.
